tools/spi-drivers.title: SPI Driver Documentation
tools/spi-drivers.summary: This documentation details a comprehensive SPI communication stack for the Pico-Pro platform, enabling high-speed data exchange between a Linux host (Pico-Pro/Raspberry Pi Zero W) and RP2040.

tools/pico-pro.title: Pico-Pro Platform - Complete Implementation
tools/pico-pro.summary: This document provides a comprehensive implementation guide for the Pico-Pro platform, detailing its system architecture and offering complete, compilable code examples. It focuses on the Pico-Pro acting as an SPI Master, coordinating real-time tasks across Pi Pico and ESP32 slave processors for applications like sensor processing and multi-processor control. The guide covers bootloader implementation, system controller logic, and high-bandwidth SPI communication with hardware interrupts for low-latency data exchange.

tools/pico-pro-alpine.title: Pico-Pro Platform on Alpine Linux - Buildroot-Free Implementation
tools/pico-pro-alpine.summary: This guide details implementing the Pico-Pro platform using Alpine Linux, offering a Buildroot-free embedded experience. It leverages Alpine's pre-built packages, OpenRC, and `apk` for faster development and easier maintenance, avoiding complex cross-compilation. The system incorporates A/B partitioning for robust updates and a custom C++ system controller for managing boot modes, watchdog, heartbeat, and USB gadget functionality.

tools/minimal-linux-alternatives.title: Minimal Linux Alternatives to Buildroot
tools/minimal-linux-alternatives.summary: This guide explores lightweight Linux distributions as alternatives to Buildroot for embedded projects, comparing options like Alpine Linux, Buildroot, and OpenWrt to help developers choose the right solution for their specific requirements.

tools/drone-firmware-protocol-specificat.title: DroneFirmware Communication Protocol Specification
tools/drone-firmware-protocol-specificat.summary: This technical specification details the comprehensive communication protocols used in the DroneFirmware project, including RC to Flight Controller serial protocol, ESP-NOW wireless protocol, SPI protocol for companion computer communication, and Mavlink protocol for ground control station integration.

tools/dronefirmware-open-source-flight-c.title: DroneFirmware: Open Source Drone Flight Controller
tools/dronefirmware-open-source-flight-c.summary: DroneFirmware is an open-source drone flight controller built on Raspberry Pi Pico that operates standalone without needing a companion computer. This guide covers hardware setup, firmware building, flashing instructions, RC module configuration, and usage instructions for building autonomous drones.

life/weekly-progress-update.title: Weekly Progress Update: Building the Weekly Blog Page
life/weekly-progress-update.summary: A new `/weekly` page has been implemented for an Astro-powered blog, designed to provide readers with a quick overview of all content published within the current ISO week. This feature helps users easily discover

life/weekly-update-dronefirmware.title: Weekly Update: DroneFirmware, Skill Updates, and Blog Improvements
life/weekly-update-dronefirmware.summary: This week's update covers the new DroneFirmware open-source drone flight controller project, converting all blog skills to English, fixing lint warnings, and adding comprehensive usage guides for the firmware.

tools/nova-ai-companion.title: NOVA — Your Self-Hosted AI Companion, Inspired by Neuro-sama
tools/nova-ai-companion.summary: NOVA is an open-source, self-hosted AI companion platform inspired by Neuro-sama, capable of realtime voice chat, playing Minecraft and Factorio, and rendering Live2D/VRM avatars. It runs entirely in-browser via WebGPU or as a native desktop app with CUDA/Metal acceleration.

life/weekly-back-after-hiatus.title: Back After a Hiatus — Sinhala & Tamil New Year and Family Time
life/weekly-back-after-hiatus.summary: A brief update after a two-month hiatus due to Sinhala and Tamil New Year celebrations and family commitments. The author is easing back into the groove with new projects and posts coming soon.
